description: Detects insecure deserialization in JavaScript/TypeScript: eval/Function on JSON.parse result, postMessage without origin check. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes with member_expression function (JSON.parse pattern) -- cannot filter to only JSON.parse or check if result is passed to eval without #match? predicate support. All member calls flagged.

flag.message: Member expression call detected -- verify JSON.parse results are not passed to eval() or new Function(), and postMessage listeners validate event.origin
